III, title III, § 301, ; , title III, § 301, , which related to transfer of materials, etc., to Bureau of ionosphere observation by Departments of the Army, Navy, and Air Force, was from the Department of Commerce Appropriation Act, 1952, and has not been repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.Oct. 22, 1951, ch. 53365 Stat. 593Sept. 6, 1950, ch. 89664 Stat. 628July 20, 1949, ch. 35463 Stat. 468
